goal: Detect phantom API mirage in plan with non-existent function reference
description: Given a plan that references a function 'processWidgets()' which does not exist in the codebase, AssumptionVerifier should identify this as pattern 1 (Phantom API) with verdict MIRAGE and severity BLOCKING.

input.plan_excerpt: Phase 1 calls processWidgets() from utils/widgets.js to transform the input data before persistence.
